name: Freeze
description: Freeze trash items from falling for 5 seconds.

name: Slow
description: Slows the fall of trash items for 5 seconds by x0.5.

name: Auto Sort
description: Automatically sorts trash on the right bin for 5 seconds.

name: Speed
description: Speeds up the fall of thras items x2 but also earns x2 of the score for 10 seconds.

name: Revive
description: Revives you when you ran out of hearts.
